data.title: MSC Industrial Supply ecommerce grows as Q3 sales exceed $1 billion
data.description: The company's sales increased by 7.8% from a year ago, helped by vending and In-Plant Solutions.

data.title: Square launches agentic commerce integrations with ChatGPT, Claude
data.description: The integrations include an app for ChatGPT and a plugin for Claude. Square said they help sellers to "get discovered and transact at the exact moment customers are making purchasing decisions through AI-powered conversations."

data.title: Report: Friendly fraud on the rise, merchants using AI to mitigate damages
data.description: Chargebacks911 said among merchants who reported a change in friendly fraud over the past three years, 73.7% said the problem had worsened. That figure rose to 83.4% among enterprise merchants.

data.title: Visa sees AI investments, consumer adjustments supporting economic outlook
data.description: Even if AI spending does not immediately result in productivity gains, Visa analysts still expect that improved processes over time will help the global economy.

data.title: Klaviyo launches beta for marketing AI agents
data.description: Klaviyo said it built the agents into its customer relationship management (CRM) platform, allowing them to work from the same real-time customer data across marketing and service.
